creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
adrian asked met to report the following lor's which according to him are multicast related.

    root@crashalot.rainbow-runner.nl:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64
FreeBSD clang version 3.4.1 (tags/RELEASE_34/dot1-final 208032) 20140512
